summary: IDF completed a complex engineering operation to seal a 16+ km underground tunnel in southern Rafah where Sgt. Hadar Goldin's body was held, using over 30,000 cubic meters of concrete over three months. An IDF reservist was severely wounded by an explosion in southern Lebanon. Western intelligence sources warn the Houthis are exploiting the current period to upgrade their missile array and conduct launch tests to extend range and improve accuracy.
key_points: IDF and Shin Bet eliminated Ismail al-Masri, Hamas's military security chief in the Rafah battalion, in an airstrike last week. (Source: @pkpoi/143030)

IDF completed sealing a 16+ km underground tunnel in southern Rafah that was used by Hamas and held the body of Sgt. Hadar Goldin, using over 30,000 cubic meters of concrete over three months. (Source: @yediotnews25/132069)
An IDF reservist was severely wounded by an explosion in southern Lebanon and was evacuated to a hospital; his family was notified. (Source: @idf_telegram/24474)
Western intelligence sources warn the Houthis are upgrading their missile array and conducting launch tests to extend range and improve accuracy. (Source: @pkpoi/143032)

Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian announced that $6 billion of Iran's funds frozen in Qatari accounts are expected to be released under the agreement with the United States. (Source: @asafroz/50837)

Iran's Foreign Ministry stated no negotiations at any level with the US are taking place in the coming days, clarifying that an Iranian delegation traveling to Qatar is discussing implementation of a memorandum of understanding, not a final deal. (Source: @asafroz/50849)

Iranian Parliament National Security Committee head said the Strait of Hormuz is an inseparable part of Iranian national sovereignty and its management is Tehran's sole responsibility. (Source: @naya_foriraq/80362)
Oman's Foreign Minister Badr al-Busaidi expressed support for Iran's plan to impose maritime service fees on vessels crossing the Strait of Hormuz. (Source: @PressTV/196192)

sections.executive_summary: IDF completed a complex engineering operation to seal a 16+ km underground tunnel in southern Rafah where Sgt. Hadar Goldin's body was held, using over 30,000 cubic meters of concrete over three months. An IDF reservist was severely wounded by an explosion in southern Lebanon and evacuated to a hospital. Western intelligence sources warn the Houthis are exploiting the current period to upgrade their missile array and conduct launch tests to extend range and improve accuracy.

points: Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian announced that $6 billion of Iran's funds frozen in Qatari accounts are expected to be released under the agreement with the United States. (Source: @asafroz/50837)

Iran's Foreign Ministry stated no negotiations at any level with the US are taking place in the coming days, clarifying that an Iranian delegation traveling to Qatar is discussing implementation of a memorandum of understanding, not a final deal. (Source: @asafroz/50849)

Iranian Parliament National Security Committee head said the Strait of Hormuz is an inseparable part of Iranian national sovereignty and its management is Tehran's sole responsibility. (Source: @naya_foriraq/80362)
Iranian Foreign Minister stated Lebanon's sovereignty is not ensured by disarming the resistance but by ending occupation and aggression. (Source: @naya_foriraq/80362)
Oman's Foreign Minister Badr al-Busaidi expressed support for Iran's plan to impose maritime service fees on vessels crossing the Strait of Hormuz. (Source: @PressTV/196192)

Iranian Defense Minister Katz stated Trump prevented the collapse of Hezbollah by linking Iran to Lebanon to close a deal with Tehran, preventing a massive blow against Hezbollah across Lebanon. (Source: @New_security8200/202152)

Katz stated Iran has not yet decided whether to return to the nuclear plan, and fighting with Iran will resume either if Trump decides negotiations have failed or if Iran fires on Israel. (Source: @New_security8200/202152)

IDF and Shin Bet eliminated Ismail al-Masri, Hamas's military security chief in the Rafah battalion, in an airstrike last week; he was responsible for advancing activities intended to harm IDF freedom of operation in Gaza. (Source: @pkpoi/143030)

IDF completed sealing a 16+ km underground tunnel in southern Rafah that was used by Hamas and held the body of Sgt. Hadar Goldin, using over 30,000 cubic meters of concrete over three months; the infrastructure included approximately 80 living quarters and a command center. (Source: @yediotnews25/132069)
An IDF reservist was severely wounded by an explosion in southern Lebanon and was evacuated to a hospital; his family was notified. (Source: @idf_telegram/24474)

IDF eliminated Zahir Brahim Halil Abu Salim, an Islamic Jihad militant who infiltrated Israeli territory on October 7 and participated in kidnapping civilians from their homes and holding them captive. (Source: @inon_yttach/9204)

Defense Minister Katz stated the massive tunnel destroyed yesterday was not previously known to IDF, and hundreds of tons of explosives would be needed to detonate such tunnels. (Source: @New_security8200/202152)

Katz stated the threat of invasion from Lebanon still exists with 1,200 Hezbollah operatives from the border to the Litani, and notified the US Central Command commander that Israel will not withdraw from security zones in Gaza, Syria, and Lebanon. (Source: @New_security8200/202152)

The IDF Chief of Staff stated the war has changed operational methods and perceptions, and IDF is preparing for the continuation of fighting and many remaining challenges, marking 1,000 days of war. (Source: @inon_yttach/9205)

IDF and Shin Bet eliminated Ismail al-Masri, Hamas's military security chief in the Rafah battalion, in an airstrike last week; he was a senior figure in Hamas mechanisms in Rafah responsible for security and intelligence obstruction. (Source: @pkpoi/143030)

IDF completed sealing a 16+ km underground tunnel in southern Rafah that was used by Hamas and held the body of Sgt. Hadar Goldin, using over 30,000 cubic meters of concrete over three months; the infrastructure included approximately 80 living quarters and a command and control center located under public buildings including schools and clinics. (Source: @yediotnews25/132069)
IDF forces in the Southern Command are deployed according to the agreement and will continue to operate to remove any immediate threat. (Source: @pkpoi/143030)
Defense Minister Katz notified the US Central Command commander that Israel will not withdraw from security zones in Gaza. (Source: @New_security8200/202152)
An IDF reservist was severely wounded by an explosion in southern Lebanon and was evacuated to a hospital; his family was notified. (Source: @idf_telegram/24474)
Six people were wounded by gunfire in a match in Wadi Jilo in southern Lebanon following the Brazil vs. Japan game. (Source: @lelotsenzura/93314)
A transport helicopter was detected heading toward northern occupied Palestine (southern Lebanon). (Source: @redlinkleb/29109)
Defense Minister Katz stated the threat of invasion from Lebanon still exists with 1,200 Hezbollah operatives from the border to the Litani. (Source: @New_security8200/202152)

Katz stated Trump prevented the collapse of Hezbollah by linking Iran to Lebanon to close a deal with Tehran, preventing a massive blow against Hezbollah across Lebanon. (Source: @New_security8200/202152)
Katz notified the US Central Command commander that Israel will not withdraw from security zones in Lebanon. (Source: @New_security8200/202152)
Defense Minister Katz notified the US Central Command commander that Israel will not withdraw from security zones in Syria. (Source: @New_security8200/202152)
Iraqi police published images of dollar amounts found at the home of Ali al-Nasif, a Shia parliament member and member of parliament's anti-corruption committee. (Source: @kianmeli1/88227)
The vehicle carrying Mohammad Akbarzadeh, political deputy of the IRGC Navy, overturned and he was killed. (Source: @kianmeli1/88232)

Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian announced that $6 billion of Iran's funds frozen in Qatari accounts are expected to be released under the agreement with the United States. (Source: @asafroz/50837)
An Iranian delegation traveled to Qatar to discuss implementation of a memorandum of understanding with Qatari officials, not to begin negotiations for a final deal. (Source: @asafroz/50849)
Oman's Foreign Minister Badr al-Busaidi expressed support for Iran's plan to impose maritime service fees on vessels crossing the Strait of Hormuz. (Source: @PressTV/196192)

Iranian Parliament National Security Committee head said the Strait of Hormuz is an inseparable part of Iranian national sovereignty and its management is Tehran's sole responsibility. (Source: @naya_foriraq/80362)

sections.threat_assessment: The Houthis are actively upgrading their missile capabilities according to Western intelligence, conducting launch tests to extend range and improve accuracy, representing an escalating threat to maritime and regional security. In Lebanon, the continued presence of 1,200 Hezbollah operatives from the border to the Litani and the severe wounding of an IDF reservist by explosion indicate persistent cross-border danger. Iran's frozen $6 billion in Qatar and the delegation's focus on implementing a memorandum of understanding rather than negotiating a final deal suggest the diplomatic track remains fragile, with Defense Minister Katz warning that fighting with Iran will resume if negotiations fail or if Iran fires on Israel.
sections.regional_response: Oman's Foreign Minister Badr al-Busaidi publicly backed Iran's plan to impose maritime service fees on vessels crossing the Strait of Hormuz, signaling regional alignment with Tehran's position on strategic waterway governance. Iran's Foreign Ministry explicitly distanced itself from US negotiations, stating that the Qatar delegation visit concerns implementation of an existing memorandum of understanding, not a new deal. The White House spokesperson stated that violence from Iran will be met with violence and that the US will continue to respond to Iranian attacks on commercial vessels.
sections.intelligence_notes: Defense Minister Katz revealed that a massive tunnel destroyed in Lebanon was not previously known to IDF, stating that hundreds of tons of explosives would be needed to detonate such tunnels, suggesting an expanded and undetected Hezbollah subterranean infrastructure. Katz also disclosed that Trump's intervention prevented the collapse of Hezbollah by linking Iran to Lebanon to close a deal with Tehran, indicating US diplomatic influence on Israeli operational planning. The vehicle carrying Mohammad Akbarzadeh, political deputy of the IRGC Navy, overturned resulting in his death, though the circumstances remain as reported without further detail.
